reasoning: The control 11.5.1 relates to ensuring that configuration recording and auditing are enabled across all regions in cloud environments. In Kubernetes, this maps to ensuring that audit logging is enabled and properly configured to capture necessary metadata, as Kubernetes does not inherently have the concept of 'regions' like cloud providers. The equivalent in Kubernetes is to ensure that audit logs are enabled and retained properly to monitor and record configuration changes and access events.
title: Requirement 11.5.1
